courseleaf.title: Creative Writing, Master of Fine Arts
courseleaf.informationtext:
Zinzi Clemmons, M.F.A., Director

Graduate Study

The Department of English offers programs of study and research leading to the M.F.A. in Creative Writing. Detailed information may be obtained from the graduate advisor, the Chairperson of the Department, or the English Department.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Creative Writing.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: The UC Davis graduate creative writing program is a two-year studio degree rooted in the study and creation of literature which reaches toward the other arts, with the goal of presenting students with a wide range of aesthetic approaches and models for being a writer.
